document.title: NI 43-101 Technical Report for the Elk Creek Project in Nebraska, United States dated April 2012.pdf
document.description: This technical report provides an updated resource estimate for the Elk Creek Nb deposit in Nebraska, including details about drilling, mineralization, and geological setting.
